hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH||''; if(p.endsWith('games.js')){const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const b=h.replace(/games\.js\?v=(\d+)/,(_,n)=>'games.js?v='+(+n+1));if(b!==h){fs.writeFileSync('index.html',b);console.log('Bumped games.js version');}}"

node -e "const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH||''; if(p.endsWith('script.js')){const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const b=h.replace(/script\.js\?v=(\d+)/,(_,n)=>'script.js?v='+(+n+1));if(b!==h){fs.writeFileSync('index.html',b);console.log('Bumped script.js version');}}"
